name: wired-not-mock
description: Behavioral smoke assertions (T3): a feature must actually do the thing end-to-end, observed black-box from a capture artifact — not trusted from a 200 or a hardcoded success flag.

assertions.summary: Triggering an email path produces a real outbound send/enqueue attempt, not a no-op/stub transport.
assertions.red: outbound empty or only stub transports (audited #131/#129)
assertions.green: at least one outbound attempt over a real transport

assertions.summary: Creating two overlapping bookings/slots is actually rejected — only one of an overlapping pair is accepted.
assertions.green: overlap exercised and no two accepted attempts overlap
